name: Statistics

values.name: atLeast
values.comment:
Alias for max, to make piped usage more intuitive

    number |> atLeast 5

values.name: atMost
values.comment:
Alias for max, to make piped usage more intuitive

    number |> atMost 5

values.name: avg
values.comment: Calculate the mean of a list of Float

values.name: avgInt
values.comment: Calculate the mean of a list of Int

values.name: median
values.comment:
Get the median of a sorted list of Float

If the length of the list is even, the retun value is the average of the two
values at the middle of the list.
Returns `Nothing` if the list is empty

values.name: medianInt
values.comment:
Get the median of a sorted list of Int

If the length of the list is even, the retun value is the average of the two
values at the middle of the list.
Returns `Nothing` if the list is empty

values.name: minmax
values.comment:
Get minimum and maximum from list

Returns `Nothing` if list is empty

values.name: occurrences
values.comment:
Get a `Dict` containing the numbers from the list as keys
and the number of occurrences for each number as value

values.name: percentile
values.comment:
Get the element at a position in percent from a list

If the percentage doesn't exactly match an element the value is interpolated
from the two closest elements

values.name: percentileInt
values.comment:
Get the element at a position in percent from a list

If the percentage doesn't exactly match an element the value is interpolated
from the two closest elements

values.name: stdDeviation
values.comment: Get the standard deviation of a population of Float

values.name: stdDeviationInt
values.comment: Get the standard deviation of a population of Int
